name: What is the fastest way to make Siri understand me better?
description: Use exact times, names, and actions. Specific commands work better than vague ones.

mainEntity.name: What is the fastest way to make Siri understand me better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Siri optimization is mostly about precision. Use exact times, app names, contact names, and clear actions, such as “Remind me at 5 PM tomorrow” instead of “Remind me later.” Clear phrasing reduces recognition errors and improves task completion.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use exact times, names, and actions. Specific commands work better than vague ones.
